title: elaphoglossum longius
intro: Elaphoglossum longius is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum longius include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum longius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
